data.raceComments: {"comment":"4. NETHERTON FLYER struggled for best form latest, finishing 5th (22.20) in a Class 1/2 at this track. Has won here at this journey. Slow to jump but has a powerful finish. Has claims if he runs up to expectations. 8. KIND OF MAGIC showed little early speed at his last couple, the latest finishing fourth (26.40) in a Class 1/2 at this track. Should be about the money. 3. FRUIT PARTY returned a better run last time, finishing in the money (22.03) at this track behind Opawa Jenny in a Class 1. Chased the leaders and with a clean run can be prominent. Expected to be in this for a long way. 6. HOOKED ON JAZZ picked up a cheque over this course and distance most recently - in the mix again.","runners":[4,8,3,6],"exclusive":false}
